top_wedges.wedge: A 90‑day, Swiss‑hosted pilot timed for shoulder season that delivers weekly revenue actions and clean direct‑revenue attribution, replacing fragmented tools and agency tasks
Low-risk, Swiss-hosted 60–90 day pilot tied to a clear direct-booking KPI with PMS attribution, delivering a weekly action plan that saves management/agency hours.

A Swiss-hosted, PMS-integrated 90-day pilot priced in the 1–2k/month band that replaces part of agency spend and produces a weekly, 3-step action list with attributable direct-revenue and OTA-commission savings

top_blockers.blocker: Unproven direct-booking attribution and PMS/booking-engine integration access/timelines.
Owner pushback on recurring spend and contract length without local proof and KPI guarantees.
Owner/finance skepticism about ROI attribution and added operational burden, compounded by PMS/CRS integration lead times and potential agency resistance.

top_deal_killers.killer: No reliable PMS/booking-engine integration for direct booking attribution.
Failure to demonstrate attributable ROI on direct bookings/revenue within the pilot window or inability to satisfy Swiss‑hosted GDPR/data‑governance requirements.
